summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Enhanced Financial Metrics Step 2 with M&A-grade inputs. All 12 requested features verified working with 100% pass rate.
passed_tests: ARR/MRR toggle shows 'I know ARR' / 'I know MRR' buttons - VERIFIED
When MRR selected, computed ARR shown in helper text (e.g., $1,200,000 for $100K MRR) - VERIFIED
GRR field exists with enhanced tooltip - VERIFIED
NRR field shows warning if NRR < GRR ('NRR < GRR is unusual. Please verify.') - VERIFIED
NRR field shows warning if NRR > 200% ('Very high (>200%). Double-check your data.') - VERIFIED
Logo churn field with Monthly/Annual frequency toggle - VERIFIED
EBITDA/SDE toggle switches between two different inputs correctly - VERIFIED
Customer concentration field shows warning if > 30% ('High concentration (>30%). Multiple likely discounted.') - VERIFIED
Customer count field exists with enhanced tooltip - VERIFIED
Revenue mix shows warning if total != 100% ('Total: 90% — must equal 100%') - VERIFIED
Gross margin shows warning if outside 30-95% (<30%: 'Unusually low for SaaS', >95%: 'Unusually high. Verify COGS') - VERIFIED
Enhanced tooltips show definition, example, and typical range - VERIFIED (Screenshot captured)
critical_code_review_comments: EnhancedTooltip component properly implemented with title, definition, example, range fields
WarningBadge component uses amber-50 background with AlertTriangle icon for soft non-blocking warnings
ARR/MRR and EBITDA/SDE toggles use AnimatePresence for smooth transitions
Revenue mix validation correctly calculates total and shows warning when != 100%
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for all new M&A-grade fields
ValuationPreviewPanel updates in real-time with new field calculations (GRR, concentration, revenue mix)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user, session, and project for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced Financial Metrics Step 2 fully functional. Key test selectors: toggle-arr, toggle-mrr, input-arr, input-mrr, input-growth-rate, input-gross-margin, input-nrr, input-grr, churn-monthly, churn-annual, input-logo-churn, toggle-ebitda, toggle-sde, input-ebitda, input-sde, input-customer-count, input-concentration, input-rev-subscription, input-rev-usage, input-rev-services. Soft warnings appear as amber badges (bg-amber-50) below inputs when validation conditions triggered. Enhanced tooltips (EnhancedTooltip component) show on hover with title, definition, example, and typical range. Route: /valuation/new/{projectId}
